intro: Financial services and cryptocurrency firms were the most targeted sectors in a series of fraud incidents reported between April 12 and April 18, 2026. The activity, concentrated in the United States and globally, also impacted the entertainment, retail, and e-commerce industries. Of the eleven articles cataloged, the majority detailed high and medium-severity threats, indicating a significant operational risk. This period saw a diverse range of fraudulent schemes aimed at exploiting digital transactions and trust across these critical sectors.
